name: cs-agent-mcp
description: 通过 MCP 统一创建、调用和编排本机 Codex、Claude 等编码 Agent
author: CodeStable

scripts.build:quiet: tsdown --logLevel silent src/mcp-cli.ts --format esm --clean --platform node --target node22 --no-fixedExtension
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run check:docs && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run pack:check
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --type-aware --tsconfig=tsconfig.test.json --fix src test && pnpm run format
scripts.prepack: tsdown --logLevel silent src/mcp-cli.ts --format esm --clean --platform node --target node22 --no-fixedExtension
scripts.test: pnpm run build:test && node --test dist-test/test/agent-diagnostics.test.js dist-test/test/client.test.js dist-test/test/file-session-store.test.js dist-test/test/mcp-cli.test.js dist-test/test/mcp-e2e.test.js dist-test/test/mcp-facade-lock.test.js dist-test/test/mcp-facade-store.test.js dist-test/test/mcp-facade.test.js dist-test/test/mcp-runtime-adapter.test.js dist-test/test/runtime-manager.test.js dist-test/test/spawn-options.test.js
